description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 21 hrs 47 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 35 mins. His activity was spread across 6 projects, and the main languages were Java, Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded.
